title: Organoform circuitry
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''[[Sekotan Personal Starship|Organoform]] circuitry''' was circuitry used in [[Sekotan Personal Starship|Sekotan starships]] to interface between the living ship and its mechanical parts. For hundreds of years before [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], due to its rarity, this technology was only rumored to exist. The circuitry used in the ''[[Jabitha]]'', [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] ship, was a delicate crystalline structure.

{{Tech-stub}}

*''[[Rogue Planet]]''
